import React,{useMemo}from"react";import{PeriodizationChart}from"./Charts";import{SpotlightTarget}from"@atlaskit/onboarding";import{useTranslation}from"../../i18n";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export const PeriodizationChartContainer=_ref=>{let{periodizationResults}=_ref;const{t}=useTranslation();const chartDataJs=useMemo(()=>{if(periodizationResults.length===0)return{labels:[],datasets:[]};// Localize the X-axis labels (e.g., "Year 1", "År 1")
